Afi Crown Alpha.description: Flamefete Ticket headgear. Its flames dance in the midsummer heat, flames rising ever higher.

Ajarakan Helm.description: Imposing Ajarakan head armor. Donning it will draw the fires from within to burst forth.

Ajarakan Helm Alpha.description: Imposing Ajarakan head armor. Donning it will draw the fires from within to burst forth.

Ajarakan Helm Beta.description: Imposing Ajarakan head armor. Donning it will draw the fires from within to burst forth.

Alloy Helm.description: A helmet crafted from quality ore. While it doesn't look like much, this is highly functional armor.

Alloy Helm Alpha.description: A helmet crafted from quality ore. While it doesn't look like much, this is highly functional armor.

Amstrigian Alpha.description: A stuffed Amstrigian. Its original design could blow bubbles, but the feature was removed after proving unpopular.

Analytic E.Y.E. Alpha.description: Cyberesque specs that display a host of info right on the lenses. This is the Future of Hunting.

Arkvulcan Helm Alpha.description: A helmet made from Arkveld spoils. The design was worn by a knight errant who reshaped the world.

Arkvulcan Helm Beta.description: A helmet made from Arkveld spoils. The design was worn by a knight errant who reshaped the world.

Artian Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made of eldritch scraps. Artisans debated its design for seven nights.

Aviator Shades Alpha.description: Rugged and stylish sunglasses that will have you looking the part of a hard-boiled but dependable veteran hunter.

Azuz Headdress Alpha.description: Headwear worn in the village of the Everforge. The hairpin's fine details speak to the Bonefolk's artistry.

Balahara Helm.description: A Balahara helmet covered in roughly polished protrusions to strongly evoke its namesake.

Balahara Helm Alpha.description: A Balahara helmet covered in roughly polished protrusions to strongly evoke its namesake.

Balahara Helm Beta.description: A Balahara helmet covered in roughly polished protrusions to strongly evoke its namesake.

Bale Burgeonet Alpha.description: Head armor worn by a dark knight. Shadowy proof of those who have tamed the darkness within.

Barina Headgear.description: Lala Barina head armor. The rose embellishments were fashioned from its carapace.

Barina Headgear Alpha.description: Lala Barina head armor. The rose embellishments were fashioned from its carapace.

Barina Headgear Beta.description: Lala Barina head armor. The rose embellishments were fashioned from its carapace.

Battle Helm Alpha.description: Head armor designed for seasoned hunters. They say it must be earned, so novices dare not wear it.

Blango Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Blangonga materials. Overflowing with the honor of a foreign god.

Blango Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Blangonga materials. Overflowing with the honor of a foreign god.

Blossom Headgear Alpha.description: Blossom Ticket head armor. This eye-catching accessory is sure to brighten up the season.

Bone Helm.description: Traditional head armor crafted from monster bones. Believe it or not, it offers pretty good insulation.

Bone Helm Alpha.description: Traditional head armor crafted from monster bones. Believe it or not, it offers pretty good insulation.

Bulaqchi Specs.description: Spectacles made from Bulaqchi parts. The hottest new design for the stylish hunter.

Bulaqchi Specs Alpha.description: Spectacles made from Bulaqchi parts. The hottest new design for the stylish hunter.

Bulaqchi Specs Beta.description: Spectacles made from Bulaqchi parts. The hottest new design for the stylish hunter.

Butterfly Vertex Alpha.description: Dazzling armor made from insect parts. Its light weight and color are proof of one's class.

Ceremonial Helm Alpha.description: Lumenhymn Ticket headgear. Luxurious and regal, it glows with the splendor of winter.

Chainmail Headgear.description: Head armor made of woven chain links. Its familiar design inspires trust in hunters who wear it.

Chainmail Headgear Alpha.description: Head armor made of woven chain links. Its familiar design inspires trust in hunters who wear it.

Chatacabra Helm.description: Chatacabra head armor. The design is specially tailored for desert hunting.

Chatacabra Helm Alpha.description: Chatacabra head armor. The design is specially tailored for desert hunting.

Chatacabra Helm Beta.description: Chatacabra head armor. The design is specially tailored for desert hunting.

Clerk Visor Alpha.description: Grand Hub handler head armor. Woven in a unique way to provide more protection than its appearance suggests.

Comaqchi Accessory.description: A Comaqchi head accessory. The thin, sleek plating emanates an eldritch gleam.

Comaqchi Accessory Alpha.description: A Comaqchi head accessory. The thin, sleek plating emanates an eldritch gleam.

Comaqchi Accessory Beta.description: A Comaqchi head accessory. The thin, sleek plating emanates an eldritch gleam.

Commission Helm Alpha.description: Head armor worn by hunters on an expedition to the New World. Sturdily made.

Conga Helm.description: Head armor made from Congalala materials. Remember: it's "feral," not "unkempt."

Conga Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Congalala materials. Remember: it's "feral," not "unkempt."

Conga Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Congalala materials. Remember: it's "feral," not "unkempt."

Dahaad Shardhelm Alpha.description: Jin Dahaad head armor modelled after the helm of a member of a lost kingdom's royalty. It evokes the royal's icy gaze.

Dahaad Shardhelm Beta.description: Jin Dahaad head armor modelled after the helm of a member of a lost kingdom's royalty. It evokes the royal's icy gaze.

Dahaad Shardhelm Gamma.description: Head armor made from special Jin Dahaad materials. The shining white helm evokes the dignity of the Arch-tempered.

Damascus Helm Alpha.description: A steel helmet of precious origin and rare manufacture that is said to lead the wearer to glory.

Death Stench Brain Alpha.description: Accursed armor, said to bring death. The wearer hears echoes of their victim's death throes.

Demon Prayer Beads Alpha.description: Prayer beads worn by a demon of combat who burns to become the ultimate master of the fist. (Full Armor Set)

Diver's Mask Alpha.description: Diving Ticket headgear. This underwater equipment will have you ready to dive in head first!

Dober Helm Alpha.description: Head armor fashioned from obsidian bone of unknown provenance. It resembles an all-powerful monster.

Doshaguma Helm.description: Head armor made from Doshaguma parts. Pity any enemy who dares scoff at its imposing crest.

Doshaguma Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Doshaguma parts. Pity any enemy who dares scoff at its imposing crest.

Doshaguma Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Doshaguma parts. Pity any enemy who dares scoff at its imposing crest.

Doshagumask Alpha.description: An uncanny replica Doshaguma head. The mask might be fake, but the intimidating aura it exudes is as real as it gets.

Dragonking Eyepatch Alpha.description: An accessory that instantly makes you look dashing and imposing. Bring out your budding dark side.

Dreamwalker Helm Alpha.description: Dreamspell Ticket headgear. Its crown-like silhouette is illuminated by the autumn moon—and wreathed in fear.

Duna Wildhelm.description: Uth Duna head armor. The plumage crafted from its fins convey the forest's will to the wearer.

Duna Wildhelm Alpha.description: Uth Duna head armor. The plumage crafted from its fins convey the forest's will to the wearer.

Duna Wildhelm Beta.description: Uth Duna head armor. The plumage crafted from its fins convey the forest's will to the wearer.

Duna Wildhelm Gamma.description: Head armor made from special Uth Duna materials. The vibrant plumage evokes the dignity of the Arch-tempered.

Eager Wudwud Alpha.description: Lured by the likey-like you had, a curious Wudwud has clambered along for a ride, pointing the way it wants to go.

Earrings of Dedication Alpha.description: Dignified earrings awarded to Arena combatants. Symbolizes those who support their comrades through countless challenges.

Expedition Headgear Alpha.description: Headgear based on the expedition's emblem. A leaf representing the ideals of harmony and order glitters magnificently for all to see.

Faux Felyne Alpha.description: A Felyne mask. The fur is specially crafted to look just like the real thing.

G Arkveld Helm.description: Guardian Arkveld head armor. A host of heightened senses make up for the narrow view.

G Arkveld Helm Alpha.description: Guardian Arkveld head armor. A host of heightened senses make up for the narrow view.

G Arkveld Helm Beta.description: Guardian Arkveld head armor. A host of heightened senses make up for the narrow view.

G Doshaguma Helm.description: Head armor made from Guardian Doshaguma spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Doshaguma Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Guardian Doshaguma spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Doshaguma Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Guardian Doshaguma spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Ebony Helm.description: Head armor made from Guardian Ebony Odogaron spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Ebony Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Guardian Ebony Odogaron spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Ebony Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Guardian Ebony Odogaron spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Fulgur Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Guardian Fulgur Anjanath spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Fulgur Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Guardian Fulgur Anjanath spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Rathalos Helm.description: Head armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Rathalos Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

G Rathalos Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Guardian Rathalos spoils. To don it is to be seized by unspeakable cravings.

Gelidron Mask Alpha.description: A stunning replica of a Gelidron head. If it looks like there isn't a single thought behind those eyes, it's because it's true.

Gogmazios Helm Alpha.description: Gogmazios head armor. The eyes, having seen the world's darkness, burn with bleak despair.

Gogmazios Helm Beta.description: Gogmazios head armor. The eyes, having seen the world's darkness, burn with bleak despair.

Gore Helm Alpha.description: A helmet made from Gore Magala spoils. The nether-black surface thrums with its late master's power.

Gore Helm Beta.description: A helmet made from Gore Magala spoils. The nether-black surface thrums with its late master's power.

Gourmand's Earring Alpha.description: Dignified earrings awarded to Arena combatants. Symbolizes the spirit of the gourmet, who loves food as much as the hunt.

Gravios Helm Alpha.description: A helm cast from Gravios materials. This rock-like armor deflects attacks.

Gravios Helm Beta.description: A helm cast from Gravios materials. This rock-like armor deflects attacks.

Guild Ace Earrings Alpha.description: Head protection worn by an Astrum Unit hunter. Crafted with special protections exclusive to veterans.

Guild Cross Circlet Alpha.description: Golden armor for Arena champions. It shines with the wisdom of heroes.

Gypceros Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Gypceros spoils. Its elasticity makes physical attacks bounce right off!

Gypceros Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Gypceros spoils. Its elasticity makes physical attacks bounce right off!

Half Rim Glasses Alpha.description: Refreshingly stylish glasses with frames that don't obscure your field of vision. Now you can look sophisticated on and off the hunt.

Harvest Flor Alpha.description: Harvest Ticket headgear. Inspired by the spirit of plenty, it is sure to surprise any and all who lay eyes on it.

High Metal Helm Alpha.description: Armor made from a generous portion of ore. Don't worry, it breathes surprisingly well.

Hirabami Headdress.description: Head armor made from Hirabami spoils. It keeps the wearer attuned and bound to the wind at all times.

Hirabami Headdress Alpha.description: Head armor made from Hirabami spoils. It keeps the wearer attuned and bound to the wind at all times.

Hirabami Headdress Beta.description: Head armor made from Hirabami spoils. It keeps the wearer attuned and bound to the wind at all times.

Hope Mask.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. The mask keeps the sand out.

Hope Mask Alpha.description: Armor crafted specifically for members of the expedition. The mask keeps the sand out.

Ingot Helm.description: Head armor fashioned from lustrous, golden ore. Regal protection with a crown to complete the look.

Ingot Helm Alpha.description: Head armor fashioned from lustrous, golden ore. Regal protection with a crown to complete the look.

King Beetle Vertex Alpha.description: Armor to fulfill the ambitions of those who dreamed of wielding the power to rule over bugdom.

Kitten Frames Alpha.description: Give yourself a new, mysterious look with these chic frames. Purrfect for when you want to go incognito.

Kunafa Headgear Alpha.description: Head armor with large horns traditionally worn by the leader of the Vanguard in the Windsong Village.

Kut-Ku Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from superior Yian Kut-Ku parts. Its expert crafting brings to mind the bird-like beast.

Kut-Ku Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from superior Yian Kut-Ku parts. Its expert crafting brings to mind the bird-like beast.

Lagiacrus Helm Alpha.description: A helmet made from Lagiacrus parts. Its deep azure reflects the glory of besting the Lord of the Seas.

Lagiacrus Helm Beta.description: A helmet made from Lagiacrus parts. Its deep azure reflects the glory of besting the Lord of the Seas.

Leather Headgear.description: Head armor made of treated monster hide. A safe choice, designed for multi-purpose use.

Leather Headgear Alpha.description: Head armor made of treated monster hide. A safe choice, designed for multi-purpose use.

Lovely Shades Alpha.description: Glasses with stylish yet adorable frames that are hard not to love. Now you can show everyone your undying passion for hunting.

Melahoa Hat Alpha.description: Fragrant head protection that instills a deep longing to return to the old days.

Mimiphyta Alpha.description: A Mimiphyta plushie so closely reminiscent of the real flower that it attracts all sorts of Scarlet Forest insects.

Mirror Visor Alpha.description: A visor with a special coating that makes you the new pinnacle of cool. Hunt Smart, Everywhere.

Mizutsune Helm Alpha.description: Mizutsune head armor. A wedding headdress for only the most elegant and refined wedding ceremonies.

Mizutsune Helm Beta.description: Mizutsune head armor. A wedding headdress for only the most elegant and refined wedding ceremonies.

Nerscylla Helm.description: A helmet made from Nerscylla spoils. Protection this durable requires masterful precision and execution.

Nerscylla Helm Alpha.description: A helmet made from Nerscylla spoils. Protection this durable requires masterful precision and execution.

Nerscylla Helm Beta.description: A helmet made from Nerscylla spoils. Protection this durable requires masterful precision and execution.

Numinous Crown Alpha.description: Head armor imbued with Zoh Shia's soul. Fights the urge to eradicate all.

Numinous Crown Beta.description: Head armor imbued with Zoh Shia's soul. Fights the urge to eradicate all.

Omega Ear Cuffs Alpha.description: Head armor fashioned after the apex of autonomous weaponry. Observation begets evolution.

Orion Cap Alpha.description: Orion Ticket headgear, imbued with a saint's wish to deliver joy and presents to all the world.

Quematrice Helm.description: Head armor made from Quematrice spoils. The shock of feathers ties the whole look together.

Quematrice Helm Alpha.description: Head armor made from Quematrice spoils. The shock of feathers ties the whole look together.

Quematrice Helm Beta.description: Head armor made from Quematrice spoils. The shock of feathers ties the whole look together.

Rathalos Helm Alpha.description: Head armor crafted from Rathalos parts. Equivalent to a king's crown with unparalleled defense.

Rathalos Helm Beta.description: Head armor crafted from Rathalos parts. Equivalent to a king's crown with unparalleled defense.

Rathian Helm Alpha.description: Replete with queenly refinement, grace, and might, this sleek Rathian head armor has it all.

Rathian Helm Beta.description: Replete with queenly refinement, grace, and might, this sleek Rathian head armor has it all.

Regios Helm Alpha.description: Seregios head armor. A shining army adorned with a thousand merits returns home, resplendent in the morning sun.

Regios Helm Beta.description: Seregios head armor. A shining army adorned with a thousand merits returns home, resplendent in the morning sun.

Rey Sandhelm.description: Rey Dau head armor. Its crest reaches the heavens—proof that this creature bows to no one.

Rey Sandhelm Alpha.description: Rey Dau head armor. Its crest reaches the heavens—proof that this creature bows to no one.

Rey Sandhelm Beta.description: Rey Dau head armor. Its crest reaches the heavens—proof that this creature bows to no one.

Rey Sandhelm Gamma.description: Head armor made from special Rey Dau materials. The azure horns evoke the dignity of the Arch-tempered.

Rompopolo Helm.description: Rompopolo head armor. The mask is needed to ward off the material's residual toxins.

Rompopolo Helm Alpha.description: Rompopolo head armor. The mask is needed to ward off the material's residual toxins.

Rompopolo Helm Beta.description: Rompopolo head armor. The mask is needed to ward off the material's residual toxins.

Round Glasses Alpha.description: A fashionable pair of glasses. The tinted lenses are sure to add a chic flair to your hunts.

Sakuratide Headgear Alpha.description: Blossomdance Ticket headgear. It embodies the vigor of resplendent warriors from spring sunrises past.

Sealed Dragon Cloth Alpha.description: A cloth used to wrap the remains of an elder dragon. It has been sealed to prevent another calamity.

Sealed Eyepatch Alpha.description: A special order-made eyepatch. The cloth gives off a black glow, one that is difficult to comprehend.

Shadow Shades Alpha.description: A sensible pair of shades. You'll always look cool in these, no matter the situation!

Sild Hood Alpha.description: A hood worn in the Keepers' Vigil. The cocoon-like fibers afford solid protection, and breathe well too.

Skull Mask Alpha.description: A mask for impersonating the dead. They say it enhances the senses, allowing the wearer to hear the cries of lost souls.

Square Glasses Alpha.description: A sophisticated pair of glasses. A versatile look that's perfect for the hunt or the home.

Strategist Spectacles Alpha.description: Spectacles co-designed by Gemma and the Stonefolk, destined to achieve legendary fame.

Udra Mirehelm.description: Nu Udra head armor. The world through this mask is swathed in vengeance and ebony fire.

Udra Mirehelm Alpha.description: Nu Udra head armor. The world through this mask is swathed in vengeance and ebony fire.

Udra Mirehelm Beta.description: Nu Udra head armor. The world through this mask is swathed in vengeance and ebony fire.

Udra Mirehelm Gamma.description: Head armor made from special Nu Udra materials. The undulating crimson mask evokes the dignity of the Arch-tempered.

Vespoid Helm.description: A Vespoid helmet. The carapace material is susceptible to fire but offers sturdy coverage.

Vespoid Helm Alpha.description: A Vespoid helmet. The carapace material is susceptible to fire but offers sturdy coverage.

Vespoid Helm Beta.description: A Vespoid helmet. The carapace material is susceptible to fire but offers sturdy coverage.

Xu Wu Helm.description: Concealing Xu Wu head armor. Fitting attire for hunters who dwell in darkness.

Xu Wu Helm Alpha.description: Concealing Xu Wu head armor. Fitting attire for hunters who dwell in darkness.

Xu Wu Helm Beta.description: Concealing Xu Wu head armor. Fitting attire for hunters who dwell in darkness.
